name: Pete Dinunzio
description:
Rizz bro up gang (heart emoji)

Would write a proper description but i can’t be bothered, just use the bot lad.

This bot isn’t valentine themed i just wanted it to be pink.

Dead Dove tag because he’s a bit of a cunt yeah? And might call you a slur or sum.

This bot recognises other members of the Eltingville club so go wild ig huzz.

If there’s anything wrong with bro or you have any criticism lemme know gang, I’ll fix it. If bro speaks for you idc just delete where huzz speaks for you.

Sorry if the initial message is shit this is my first bot but trust the character definition is banger.
